fixture_basis: FY2026 actuals base ($215.9B rev, +65%); bull-but-defensible operating path (55%->8% growth, 65%->59% margins, 3.0% terminal=engine band ceiling). Beta held 1.75 (NVDA defensible historical; NOT reverse-engineered). WACC 13.42%.
headline: On a bullish-but-defensible operating case, NVDA market price ($211.93) sits at the 91st percentile (continuous) / ~94th (shocked) of the engine's distribution. Rich but on-distribution. Tail risk is operating (revenue+margin), not financial.
